title: Moonstone : Nightmare
description: The Independent branch of the Moonstone Mod， has added a Nightmare Base to the game
body:
## summarize
This mod is a branch of Moonstone and adds nightmare items to the game

This mod **can** be used without using Moonstone

## Main text description

When you create a new world, you will receive an abyssal gift - the Nightmare Base. If you choose to wear and bear the curse of the abyss, you will be randomly given 3 out of 7 sins.


Each sin will receive an additional stronger curse, such as' blurred vision 'or' ineffective armor '.
### The First Sin - A Glimpse of Evil Thoughts
![eye curse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eb69c0ecd2b08de62377a20cab6512ac9fe5e0e_0.webp)

However, correspondingly, you will also obtain redemption items for each sin by completing specific tasks, such as the "Disintegrating Magic Mirror" that doubles the number of accessory slots or the "Grabbing Pendant" that turns people into enemies

### The embryo of despair

![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1867700fd6c1c3475d7ef6fbcee1251e223badf9_0.webp)

Of course, this is only a small part

## Version 1.0.9.5 update:

The author realized that we cannot simply weaken the player's early stage in exchange for later strength, so we strengthened the player's early survival ability;

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2986e98a1ef842e1c1d037d191202ad4498f1644_0.webp)
You will be immune to darkness
You will be immune to blindness

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f19a6baef9e90f85746828af22abf4ae723a505_0.webp)
You have received two levels of luck bonuses
You have received two levels of loot bonuses

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc97e3f41dcd7b9140e97e3462c4db974082efcd_0.webp)
The lower the health value
The higher the attributes in all aspects

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dee64c8666ade01069765c7dab45b2aaf132c1b_0.webp)
Increase treatment by 50%

![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b502c40e81551602eda24596215204366d939dbf_0.webp)
Give ten seconds of invincibility during resurrection

![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aeefd8a6a253f490990c0ea04c79c45e8770e13_0.webp)
Wall plus ten wounded guest life armor

![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a14014c297cb5e022becd70d5cf0ed796bab08b_0.webp)
Increase experience drop by 100%

If you don't know how to play the game, you can try using JEI mods to view or access them: [NightmareBase](https://moonstonemod.fandom.com/zh/wiki/NightmareBase)
